name: Jerk Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove skin from chicken.
2. Combine spices, salt and pepper in a large bowl.
3. Add chicken and toss to coat. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
5. Add chicken and cook until browned, 4 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate.
6. Discard all but 1 tablespoon drippings from skillet.
7. Add onions and cook covered until translucent, about 4 minutes.
8. Stir in garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
9. Add chicken broth and tomato sauce. Return chicken to skillet.
10. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer covered for 30 minutes.
11. Transfer chicken to a platter. Season sauce to taste and pour over chicken.
